message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'bvec_advance' sets signal field 'bvec_iter_all.done', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=bvec_iter_all;field=done;offset=20] [oracle:assert=bvec_iter_all.done stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets done without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
